prompts: The attention mechanism in deep learning is a process that allows models to focus on specific parts of the input data when making predictions. This involves calculating attention weights, which determine the importance of different input elements based on their context. These weights are used to create a new, contextually aware representation of the input by emphasizing relevant parts and de-emphasizing less relevant ones. The resulting focused representation helps improve the model's performance by enabling it to prioritize input segments that contribute most to decision-making, leading to more accurate and context-sensitive predictions.
